arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs West Ham weather latest as first FA Cup postponement confirmed and PL2 match off
arts.sum: Aston Villa's FA Cup tie against West Ham United is set to go ahead as planned - despite the club's under-21s side seeing their Friday afternoon Premier League 2 fixture postponed due to adverse weather conditions. But Villa are planning for Friday night's FA Cup third-round tie against West Ham to take place at Villa Park.

arts.ttl: West Ham United transfer news: Barcelona, Spurs-linked striker offered to Hammers?
arts.sum: A Premier League club is reportedly offered the opportunity to sign Lille forward Jonathan David during the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Everton have started talks with Moyes alternative – Manager a ‘priority’ on Friedkin’s shortlist
arts.sum: Everton have initiated contact with Paulo Fonseca about replacing Sean Dyche at Goodison Park, but the Portuguese coach may be tempted to wait until the summer. That’s according to L’Equipe, who report that Everton have made Fonseca a ‘priority’ to replace Dyche after sacking him on Thursday. arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer hinges on Barcelona decision – Plan to pay his €20m clause
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s move for Celta Vigo defender Oscar Mingueza is now in Barcelona’s hands, as they have to decide whether to use a clause to purchase him themselves. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, who say contacts between various parties are ongoing to work out the next steps. arts.ttl: West Ham boss Graham Potter approves the signing of out-of-favour Chelsea man
arts.sum: West Ham United manager Graham Potter has started working towards saving the season for the Hammers. They started the season poorly under Julen Lopetegui even after spending heavily on new signings in the summer transfer window last year. arts.ttl: West Ham thrown into the mix as Marcus Rashford chase hots up
arts.sum: West Ham are the latest side to be linked with a move for Man Utd forward Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news: Unai Emery comments on Louie Barry future
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery comments on the future of Louie Barry, who is back at the Premier League outfit after a loan spell with Stockport County.
